text: We assign a Hold rating to Apple Inc. (AAPL) as of July 18, 2025. While the company maintains exceptional profitability with gross margins of 46.49%, operating margins of 29.99%, and free cash flow margins of 25.95% in Q3 2025, recent financial performance shows concerning pressure. Revenue declined 1.39% year-over-year to $94.04 billion, and net income fell 5.43% to $23.43 billion, indicating sequential and annual contraction. The stock has significantly underperformed the broader market over the past year, returning -5.80% compared to the S&P 500's +13.56%, representing a 19.36% negative excess return. However, recent 30-day momentum shows improvement with AAPL up 7.43% versus SPY's 5.04%, suggesting potential stabilization.
